creator: daniel@morante.net
text:
Created attachment 248869
Git diff

Python extension for the Caja file manager that adds some administrative actions to the right-click menu: "Open/Edit/Run as Administrator"

Thus port has a dependency on python bindings for Caja extensions (deskutils/python-caja) that's not currently in the ports tree.  A corresponding PR was been submitted as #252460

- Passes portlint
- Tested with poudriere
